name: dynamic-tool-policy
description: Intent-based tool selection for OpenClaw: recommend which tools to use based on the user's message. Reduces context size and tool loops when using Feishu + Ollama or similar setups.
author: peter7397

tools.name: get_recommended_tools
tools.description: Given a user message, return the recommended OpenClaw tool names and a short hint. Use this to know which tools are relevant (weather→exec, document→feishu_doc, search→web_search, etc.). Helps avoid sending too many tools to small models.

user_message.description: The latest user message text to analyze for intent.
